title: Amtech S3680 Long handle wire brush
features: DURABLE: This long handle wire brush has 25mm hardened bristles and is perfect for effective surface preparation and cleaning
ERGONOMIC HANDLE: The long, soft grip contoured handle is design to prevents you scraping your knuckles
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech long handle wire brush. 3x 18 steel wire brush with two tone grip handle for comfortable use. Designed for maximum cleaning. Long handle design to prevent knuckle scraping. Hanging card.Am Tech provides a 12 Month guarantee on all their products. Am Tech only use the best materials in their products to provide a product that meets your expectations Box Contains 1x Wire Brush with 2x Tone Grip
